items.titolo: OpenAI's agent breached Hugging Face before an AI defender caught it: What users should do next
items.descrizione: An agentic AI infiltrated the production infrastructure of an AI project. Then an AI detected it. Is this the future of cyberattacks, and how will they be defended against?
